name: Table Rock Trail
description: A popular trail with great views of the city.

name: Alice Lake Trail
description: A stunning alpine hike in the Sawtooth Wilderness leading to a pristine lake.

name: Goldbug Hot Springs
description: A rewarding hike leading to natural geothermal pools with mountain views.

name: Tubbs Hill
description: A scenic loop trail hugging the edge of Lake Coeur d'Alene.

name: Mount Borah Trail
description: A challenging scramble to the highest peak in Idaho, featuring Chicken Out Ridge.

name: Cress Creek Nature Trail
description: A paved interpretive trail offering beautiful views of the South Fork of the Snake River.

name: Scotchman Peak
description: A steep climb rewarded with panoramic views of Lake Pend Oreille and frequent mountain goat sightings.

name: Fishhook Creek Trail
description: A relatively flat trail leading to a beautiful meadow with views of the Sawtooth Mountains.

name: Hulls Gulch Nature Trail
description: A beautiful hike through the Boise foothills featuring seasonal creeks and wildflowers.

name: Darby Wind Cave
description: A scenic hike into the Jedediah Smith Wilderness leading to a fascinating limestone cave.

name: Pioneer Cabin Trail
description: A strenuous climb to a historic ski cabin offering breathtaking views of the Pioneer Mountains.

name: Craters of the Moon North Crater Flow
description: A short walk through fascinating basalt lava flows and craters.
